psalm-92-1.verse:
It is good to give thanks to the Lord
  And to sing praises to Your name, O Most High;
psalm-92-1.prayer: Lord, it is good to give thanks to You and to sing praises to Your name. Fill my heart with gratitude and worship.

psalm-92-2.verse:
To declare Your lovingkindness in the morning
  And Your faithfulness by night,
psalm-92-2.prayer: Father, help me declare Your lovingkindness in the morning and Your faithfulness by night.

psalm-92-3.verse:
With the ten-stringed lute and with the harp,
  With resounding music upon the lyre.
psalm-92-3.prayer: Lord, let my worship be joyful, sincere, and pleasing to You in every season of life.

psalm-92-4.verse:
For You, O Lord, have made me glad by what You have done,
  I will sing for joy at the works of Your hands.
psalm-92-4.prayer: Father, thank You for making me glad through Your works. Help me rejoice in all that Your hands have done.

psalm-92-5.verse:
How great are Your works, O Lord!
  Your thoughts are very deep.
psalm-92-5.prayer: Lord, Your works are great and Your thoughts are deep. Teach me to trust Your wisdom beyond my understanding.

psalm-92-6.verse:
A senseless man has no knowledge,
  Nor does a stupid man understand this:
psalm-92-6.prayer: Father, give me spiritual understanding so I do not miss Your truth or take Your works lightly.

psalm-92-7.verse:
That when the wicked sprouted up like grass
  And all who did iniquity flourished,
  It was only that they might be destroyed forevermore.
psalm-92-7.prayer: Lord, remind me that evil may appear to flourish for a moment, but only Your righteousness endures forever.

psalm-92-8.verse: But You, O Lord, are on high forever.
psalm-92-8.prayer: Father, You are exalted forever. Help me keep my eyes lifted toward Your eternal greatness.

psalm-92-9.prayer: Lord, thank You that everything opposed to You will not stand forever. Help me trust Your final victory.

psalm-92-10.verse:
But You have exalted my horn like that of the wild ox;
  I have been anointed with fresh oil.
psalm-92-10.prayer: Father, strengthen me with fresh grace and renew me with the oil of Your presence.

psalm-92-11.verse:
And my eye has looked exultantly upon my foes,
  My ears hear of the evildoers who rise up against me.
psalm-92-11.prayer: Lord, help me see Your faithfulness clearly and rest in Your justice with confidence.

psalm-92-12.verse:
The righteous man will flourish like the palm tree,
  He will grow like a cedar in Lebanon.
psalm-92-12.prayer: Father, make me flourish like the righteous, growing strong and steady in Your presence.

psalm-92-13.verse:
Planted in the house of the Lord,
  They will flourish in the courts of our God.
psalm-92-13.prayer: Lord, plant me firmly in Your house so my life may bear fruit for Your glory.

psalm-92-14.verse:
They will still yield fruit in old age;
  They shall be full of sap and very green,
psalm-92-14.prayer: Father, let my life continue to be fruitful in every season, full of spiritual vitality and faithfulness.

psalm-92-15.verse:
To declare that the Lord is upright;
  He is my rock, and there is no unrighteousness in Him.
psalm-92-15.prayer: Lord, may my life declare that You are upright, my rock, and completely faithful.

psalm-92-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your lovingkindness, faithfulness, and mighty works. Help me worship You with gratitude, trust Your deep wisdom, and remain planted in Your presence. Make my life fruitful in every season, strong in righteousness, and faithful in praise. May everything I do declare that You are my rock and that there is no unrighteousness in You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
